description: Configure Screaming Frog SEO Spider to simulate bypassing a firewall or accessing a restricted environment by sending a custom HTTP request header named 'X-Audit-Token' with the value 'SF-Verified-9988'. Crawl 'https://crawler-test.com/other/crawler_request_headers' and verify the header is received by performing a custom search for 'SF-Verified-9988' in the page source. Export the custom search results to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/custom_header_evidence.csv'.
